project.description: The name of the project to add Mat Expressive styles to.

components.description: Button Family components to include styles for in a SCSS project, or ["all"] (default). Valid keys: button, icon-button, button-group, split-button, fab-menu, fab-menu-trigger, or "all" — validated by the schematic itself (not this schema, and deliberately not an `items.enum` — see below) so a single comma-separated entry (e.g. from --components=button,icon-button on the command line) and unknown keys are both handled gracefully with a warning rather than a hard schema-validation failure. When omitted in an interactive terminal for a SCSS project, the Angular CLI asks which components to include (via x-prompt below). Ignored (with a log note) for CSS projects, which always get the full prebuilt stylesheet.

x-prompt.message: mat-exp: which components would you like to include styles for?
